title: hieracium vasconicum subsp. stenoprionatum
intro: Hieracium vasconicum subsp. stenoprionatum, also known as Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hawkweed include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Hawkweed can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
